vulnerabilities.description: The infrastructure lacks Helmet and CORS configuration with a whitelist.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet middleware to secure HTTP headers and configure CORS with a whitelist to allow requests only from trusted origins.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting is not implemented, leaving the application vulnerable to DoS attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate a rate-limiting middleware to control the number of requests per user within a time frame, based on environment variables like RATE_LIMIT_MAX and RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW.

vulnerabilities.description: There is no evidence of input sanitization besides Zod validation. Other routes and inputs are not covered here.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement a comprehensive input sanitization strategy for all user inputs, potentially using libraries like express-validator.

vulnerabilities.description: Environment secrets are utilized in logging configuration which could lead to secrets exposure if not properly sanitized.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure logs do not inadvertently capture sensitive data such as environment secrets by reviewing log contexts and avoiding sensitive information logging.

vulnerabilities.description: There is no middleware for JWT or OAuth2 validation visible in provided paths.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure all API endpoints, except unrestricted ones, validate JWT tokens and manage user permissions properly using a middleware.
